subcodes.title: Words to an army commander, spoken on 1914-05-12
subcodes.first_line: Today in the world of humanity the most important matter is the question of Universal Peace. The realization of this principle is the crying need...
subcodes.subjects: @means of establishment of future civilization, @war and peace, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @relationship between government and people, @universal peace; world unity
